==Chamorro==

===Etymology===
From Pre-Chamorro {{m|und||*xima}}, from {{inh|ch|poz-pro|*kima||giant clam}}.

===Pronunciation===
* {{IPA|ch|/hi.mæ/}}

===Noun===
{{head|ch|noun}}

# [[clam]]

{{C|ch|Animals}}

==Finnish==

===Etymology===
From {{bor|fi|sv|hem}}.

===Pronunciation===
{{fi-pronunciation}}

===Noun===
{{fi-noun}} {{tlb|fi|colloquial}}

# [[home]]

====Declension====
{{fi-decl-kala|him|||a}}

====Derived terms====
* {{l|fi|kaikki himassa}}

===Further reading===
* {{R:fi:KTSK|accessdate=2023-07-02}}

===Anagrams===
* {{anagrams|fi|a=ahim|ahmi}}

==Hiligaynon==

===Noun===
{{hil-noun}}

# [[ice]]
#: {{syn|hil|yelo}}
#: '''''hima''''' kag [[kalayo]]
#:: '''''ice''''' and [[fire]]

==Indonesian==

===Pronunciation===
* {{id-pr}}

===Etymology 1===

====Noun====
{{id-noun}}

# {{lb|id|education}} {{sylabbr of|id|himpunan mahasiswa|t=student association}}

===Etymology 2===
{{bor+|id|tlb}}.

====Noun====
{{id-noun}}

# {{ng|food and household furniture given by the woman to the man in return for the dowry given during the marriage procession}}

===Further reading===
* {{R:KBBI Daring}}

==Jamamadí==

===Verb===
{{head|jaa|verb}}

# {{lb|jaa|Banawá}} to [[urge]]

===References===
* 2007. [http://archive.phonetics.ucla.edu/Language/BNH/bnh.html The UCLA Phonetics Lab Archive]. Los Angeles, CA: UCLA Department of Linguistics.

==Japanese==

===Romanization===
{{ja-romaji}}

# {{ja-romanization of|ひま}}

==Kimbundu==
[[File:Angola Colobus Monkey 2.jpg|thumb|Hima]]

===Etymology===
From {{inh|kmb|bnt-pro|*nkɪ́mà}}.

===Noun===
{{kmb-noun|9}}

# [[monkey]]

====Derived terms====
{{col|kmb
|kihima
}}

===References===
* {{R:kmb:Junior|50}}
* {{R:kmb:Matta|5}}

{{C|kmb|Primates}}

==Norwegian Nynorsk==

===Pronunciation===
* {{IPA|nn|/²hiːmɑ/}} {{nn-pronu-note}}

===Adverb===
{{nn-adv}}

# {{lb|nn|dialectal}} {{alt form|nn|heime}}

==Pali==

===Alternative forms===
{{pi-alt}}

===Etymology===
{{inh+|pi|sa|हिम||snow}}.

===Noun===
{{pi-noun|n}}

# [[snow]]

====Declension====
{{pi-decl-noun|g=n}}

===References===
* {{R:pi:PTS}} <!-- For gender -->

==Swahili==

===Etymology===
{{ety|sw|:bor|ar:هِمَّة|text=+|tree=1}}

===Pronunciation===
* {{audio|sw|Sw-ke-hima.flac|a=Kenya}}

===Adverb===
{{head|sw|adverb}}

# [[quickly]], [[hastily]], [[hurriedly]]

===Noun===
{{sw-noun|}}

# [[haste]], [[urgency]], [[zeal]]

==Taivoan==

===Etymology===
From {{inh|tvx|map-pro|*lima}}. Compare {{cog|tay|zima'}}, {{cog|xnb|rima}}, {{cog|mad|lema}}, {{cog|mg|dimy}}, {{cog|mi|rima}}, {{cog|min|limo}}, {{cog|rap|rima}}, {{cog|xsy|hima'||hand}}, {{cog|tl|lima}}, {{cog|ssf|rima}}, {{cog|tiy|limo}}, {{cog|to|nima}}, and {{cog|urk|ลีมา|tr=lima}}.

===Numeral===
{{head|tvx|numeral}}

# [[five]]

===References===
* {{R:tvx:Taivoan}}
